chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/449)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/449)
text: قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ أَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عَافِيَتَكَ فِي أُمُورِي كُلِّهَا وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ الدُّنْيَا وَ عَذَابِ الْآخِرَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Say, ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> from every goodness Your<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge is Encompassing with, and I seek Refuge with You<sup>azwj</sup> from every evil Your<sup>azwj</sup> Knowledge is Encompassing with. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> for Your<sup>azwj</sup> good health to be in my life-time, all of it, and I seek Refuge with You<sup>azwj</sup> from every disgrace of the world and the Punishment of the Hereafter’’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurara from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “O Lord, I plead to receive from You (my share of) all good which Your knowledge encompasses, I seek protection with You against all evil which is encompassed by Your knowledge, O Lord, I plead before You for good health from You in all of my affairs, I seek protection with You against losses in this world and the torment of the next life.”
